arts.ttl: Celtic suffer 'cruellest' CL exit in football after late Bayern strike
arts.sum: Sky Sports' Chris Sutton and Celtic captain Callum McGregor claimed the Hoops suffered a "cruel" ending to their journey in the Champions League after Bayern Munich defender Alphonso Davies netted a 94th minute equaliser to force them out of the competition.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers salutes courageous Celtic and insists Champions League credibility has been restored
arts.sum: It was a cruel way for the Hoops to go out as an extra time chance was snatched away from them

arts.ttl: Harry Kane gives injury update after substitution against Celtic
arts.sum: Bayern Munich star Harry Kane has given an injury update after being forced off against Celtic.

arts.ttl: Celtic Player Ratings: How every player performed in valiant away display in Europe
arts.sum: Player Ratings for Celtic's match vs Bayern Munich in the Champions League at the Allianz Arena...

arts.ttl: Celtic Instant Analysis: Rodgers' men suffer late European heartache in Munich
arts.sum: Tony Haggerty's instant analysis from the Allianz Arena as Celtic suffer last gasp heartbreak against Bayern Munich in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Alphonso Davies reflects on Celtic drama: "The most important thing is that we advanced"
arts.sum: Bayern weren't at their best against Celtic, but the most important thing is that they booked passage to the next round, according to Alphonso Davies, who made it 1-1 deep into injury time.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich 1-1 Celtic: Alphonso Davies breaks Hoops' hearts in Champions League
arts.sum: German giants squeeze into last-16 but Scottish champions exit with heads held high

arts.ttl: Brave Celtic suffer Champions League sickener as Nicolas Kuhn denied place in history by Alphonso Davies - 5 talking points
arts.sum: The Hoops were outstanding in the Allianz Arena but the Germans who progressed after an injury time leveller on the night

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich 1-1 Celtic: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Alphonso Davies becomes Bayern's hero
arts.sum: Celtic suffer Champions League heartbreak as Bayern Munich score in the dying seconds to draw 1-1 on the night and secure a 2-1 aggregate win and spot in the round of 16.

arts.ttl: Celtic fans say all the same thing about Daizen Maeda as Bayern Munich win Champions League tie
arts.sum: Celtic fans laud Daizen Maeda despite Celtic losing Champions League tie to Bayern Munich Everything was against Celtic, from being away from home to the fact that Bayern Munich have a ridiculous home record, not just this season, but during the last ten years in Europe.
